title: Panty and Stocking: Homecoming
overview: Garterbelt, Brief and Chuck team up with Scanty and Kneesocks to resurrect Panty and stop an out-of-control Stocking.

title: BITCH GIRLS 4LIFE
overview: Garterbelt has Panty, Stocking, Scanty, and Knee Socks search all over Daten City for a ghost made of oil and water.

title: The Bodycard
overview: Panty competes in a card game to pay off three trillion Daten City dollars worth of bills.

title: Project S: The Worst Ever Dojo
overview: Stocking and Scanty team up to kill a ninja.

title: Bitch Perfect
overview: The demons and angels get addicted to photos.

title: F*ck & Furious
overview: An unusual competition takes place.

title: Daten City President
overview: After Daten City makes having sex without permission illegal, Panty is sentenced to death.

title: Pet Cematary Hills
overview: One night, Panty accidentally knocks over a small gravestone.

title: Shoot for Yesterday!
overview: A mysterious cube flies in from space.

title: Rolling Sisters
overview: A storm keeps Scanty from the toilet.

title: Mutant Garterbelts
overview: Garterbelt gets possessed by a ghost.

title: Bitch Serial Killer!
overview: Panty is targeted by a serial killer.

title: The Brothers from Heaven
overview: Panty and Stocking get replaced by their cousins, the angel brothers Polyester and Polyurethane.

title: Independence Dick
overview: Garterbelt, Briefs, and Zipper finally cry out in despair at the tyranny of the Angel Sisters and Devil Sisters. Garterbelt leaves the church and heads to Casino City with Briefs to fulfill her humble dream of spending a night at Casino City's strip bar! But...

title: Longest Bitch Yard
overview: Panty and Stocking are incarcerated in a bitch prison for being bitches. They team up with the Demon Sisters, who were previously incarcerated, to take part in a bitch football tournament, where if they win, they'll be acquitted!

title: Break the Internet
overview: A rookie detective assigned to Daten City tries to find out on the internet why the city's security is deteriorating...

title: The Silence of the Internets
overview: A rookie detective in Daten City tries to research the city's public safety issues.

title: Fa Fa F*ck
overview: Garterbelt reports Panty for using a curse word too much.

title: The Ohagi of Doom
overview: Stockings takes on a rock-paper-scissors tournament for the chance to purchase a limited-edition dessert.

title: Not 2 Home Alone
overview: Polyester and Polyurethane sneak into a church but get caught.

title: Six Hundred Sixty Six Candles
overview: Panty takes Kneesocks out after everyone forgets her birthday.

title: The Sex from Another World
overview: An extraterrestrial invader drains men's life force through sex.

title: Lord of the Kokan the Great
overview: A fierce barbarian and her dragon steed seek vengeance against a two-headed demon for killing her beloved.

title: Being Chuck Maldehole
overview: Chuck gets trapped underground.

title: Panty Shorts and the Penis of Doom
overview: The Angel sisters go on a quest for a relic in a temple.

title: The Plush
overview: Stocking is targeted by two time travellers.

title: The Part-time Job Before Christmas
overview: It's Christmas Eve. Knee Socks is spending a quiet holiday alone, but when she goes to complain about the moaning sounds coming from Panty's room, she finds a bloodied old man with a white beard lying there.

title: Heaven Wars Episode One - The Family Menace
overview: Panty and Stocking are suddenly ordered to return to Heaven. The church crew is brought along to go with them, and Brief is overjoyed at the chance to visit Panty's family home...

title: Heaven Wars Episode Two - Attack of the Uncle
overview: Ramie is trying to unite the gods of Heaven. Panty, Stocking, the Demon Sisters, Garterbelt, and Brief have all been scattered—what fate awaits each of them!?

title: Heaven Wars Episode Three - Revenge of the Bitch
overview: The bitches stand in the way of the newly born King of the Gods! The final battle begins, with the fate of Heaven, Hell, and Earth at stake.
